title: Öğrenci Dekanlığı (Sağlık, Kültür ve Spor Müdürlüğü)
content:

İdari Birimler

Öğrenci Toplulukları

MENU

OKAN UNIGFB TOPLULUĞU

Misyon:

As Okan Universiteli Genc Fenerbahceliler our mission will be to support Fenerbahce in every sense, both in Istanbul or hundreds of kilometers away from home to support our team

.

Vizyon:

Our vision is to make a family by merging in non-sports and sports competitions, including football and other amateur branches. Our priority will be to make aid campaign in the name of Okan Universiteli Genc Fenerbahceliler for anyone who is in the need of aid regardless if they are part of the Fenerbahce family or not.
